title: Conditional type — T extends string ? boolean : number
description: `T extends U ? X : Y` resolves at the type-checker layer to either X or Y depending on T. `IsString<"hello">` resolves to `boolean` here. Validation pins that the conditional threads through to the resolved shape.
pureType:
type IsString<T> = T extends string ? boolean : number;
return createValidate<IsString<'hello'>>();
